Description: The AO4406AL is an N-Channel MOSFET utilizing advanced trench technology to deliver low on-state resistance (RDS(ON)) and low gate charge, enabling efficient high-current switching. It is designed to operate with gate drive voltages as low as 4.5V, making it suitable for battery protection circuits, load switches, and power management applications in systems like uninterruptible power supplies.

KeyParameters.Input Capacitance (Ciss): Not explicitly provided in doc (Derived from Qg/Vgs)
